name: Trend-Driven Social Content Generator
description: Extracts trending topics via Exa search, uses Claude AI to score trends and generate platform-specific social media content, saves the content calendar to Google Sheets, and emails a summary via Gmail. Adapted from n8n's Reddit/Google Trends social content workflow.

source.originalName: Extract trends, auto-generate social content with AI, Reddit, Google & post

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for trend research

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving content calendar

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending summary email

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for content calendar

industry.description: Industry or niche for trend research (e.g. 'SaaS marketing', 'health tech')

emailRecipient.description: Email address to send the content calendar summary

platforms.description: Comma-separated social media platforms to create content for

steps.name: Search multiple trend sources via Exa
Build Claude prompt for trend scoring and content generation
Run Claude AI trend analysis and content generation
Build content calendar rows for Sheets
Save content calendar to Google Sheets
Send content calendar summary via Gmail
